-CoQ10 is an antioxidant that is a necessary nutrient for cell function in the body and has numerous health benefits.*
-CoQ10 concentrations may decrease as we age. Supplementing with this important heart health antioxidant may help support healthy aging.*
-CoQ10 is an important antioxidant that helps maintain a healthy cardiovascular system and healthy blood pressure levels already within a normal range.*
-Statin medications can reduce CoQ10 levels in the body. CoQ10 can replenish what Statin medications may deplete. Note: CoQ10 is not intended to serve as a replacement for Statin therapy, nor should you discontinue taking any prescribed medications while supplementing with CoQ10.

statements.notes:
Quality Purity Potency
How Glucosamine & Chondroitin Sulfate Work:
Glucosamine is a basic building block for cartilage, synovial fluid and other connective tissue. It is needed for healthy structure and function of joints for optimum mobility.* Chondroitin Sulfate protects existing cartilage and serves as a building block for healthy new cartilage.*
Clinically Proven Effective**
No Preservatives - No Gluten - No Lactose

Kirkland Signature(TM) Daily Multivitamin Pack is specially formulated based on the latest research in nutritional science. This product provides a complete formulation of vitamins, minerals and Ginseng to help deliver essential nutrients that may be missed if you are not eating a balanced diet.

With today's demanding lifestyles and busy schedules, finding the time to eat a balanced diet isn't always possible. Limiting our consumption of some of the essential nutrients required for daily good health may leave us feeling rundown and fatigued.

This product contains Vitamin E and Asian ginseng. If you have abnormal blood pressure, are taking medications, facing surgery, have bleeding problems, or using any other treatment which may affect the ability of blood to clot, consult your physician before taking this product.

statements.notes: Compare to Metamucil Capsules
100% natural Psyllium Husk Fiber
Fiber Supplement

Helps lower cholesterol to promote heart health
Helps maintain healthy blood sugar levels as part of your diet
Promotes digestive health
These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.
Do not use if printed seal under cap is torn or missing.
This product is not manufactured of distributed by Proctor & Gamble, the distributor of METAMUCIL Capsules.
Gluten free (<20 ppm)

Diets low in saturated fat and cholesterol that include 7 grams of soluble fiber per day from psyllium seed husk, may reduce the risk of heart disease by lowering cholesterol levels. One serving provides 24 grams of soluble fiber.
Consult a doctor if you are considering use of the product as part of a cholesterol-lowering program.

Directions: 
Adults 12 years & over: 2-6 capsules for increasing daily fiber intake and 6 capsules for cholesterol-lowering program. Take this product with 8 oz of water (swallow 1 capsule at a time) up to 3 times daily.
Children under 12 years: Consult a doctor
New users: Start with 1 serving per day; gradually increase up to 3 servings per day as necessary. You may initially experience changes in bowel habits or minor bloating as your body adjusts to increased fiber intake.
Notice: Take this product with at least 8 oz (a full glass) of liquid. Taking this product without enough liquid may cause choking. Do not take if you have difficulty swallowing.
Notice: Take this product with at least 8 oz (a full glass) of liquid. Taking this product without enough liquid may cause choking. Do not take if you have difficulty swallowing.
Allergy alert: May cause allergic reaction in people sensitive to ingested or inhaled psyllium.

Ask a doctor before use if you have abdominal pain, nausea or vomiting or experience a sudden change in bowel habits persisting for 2 weeks.
Stop use and ask a doctor if constipation lasts more than 7 days or rectal bleeding occurs. These may be signs of a serious condition.

statements.type: Precautions re: Pregnant or Nursing or Prescription Medications
statements.notes: Bulk-forming fibers like psyllium husk may affect how well other medicines work. If you are taking a prescription medicine by mouth, take this product at least 2 hours before or 2 hours after the prescribed medicine.
Keep out of reach of children.
Store at room temperature. Protect contents from moisture.

Kirkland Signature Magnesium Citrate
Kirkland Signature Magnesium Citrate is formulated with the more absorbable magnesium citrate form, compared to magnesium oxide.
Just 2 convenient softgels per day provide 250 mg of magnesium.

Helps support healthy bones and teeth
Helps support healthy heart, muscle, and nerve function
Helps convert food into cellular energy

Magnesium is an essential mineral that is involved in over 300 biochemical reactions in the body. Magnesium is the fourth most abundant mineral in the body 50% of total body magnesium found in bone. 
How much magnesium do I need daily?
The Recommended Dietary Allowance (RDA) for adults males (19 to 30 years old) is 400 mg/day and fr adult females (19 to 30 years old) is 310 mg/day. The RDA for adult males (31 years and older) is 420 mg/day and for adult females (31 years and older) is 320 mg/day.
What are the food sources of magnesium?
Magnesium is part of chlorophyll, the pigment that gives plants their green color. Green leafy vegetables, like spinach, are therefore good sources of magnesium. Whole grains and nuts are also rich sources, including bran cereals, brown rice, peanuts and almonds.
Magnesium citrate is a more highly absorbable form than magnesium oxide.

statements.notes:
Active form of CoQ10
Ubiquinol 200 mg with Vitamin E

Helps support heart function & cellular energy production
Helps support antioxidant activity
Statin drug users: Ubiquinol may help replenish CoQ10
Dietary Supplement
Helps support heart function

The Kirkland Signature Promise
Quality Purity Potency
Kirkland Signature Ubiquinol is sourced from Kaneka Ubiquinol. Our ubiquinol provides 200 mg of CoQ10, which helps support heart function and helps neutralize free radicals in the body. Ubiquinol is found in nearly every cell of the body and is a key component in the production of cellular energy. Certain cholesterol-lowering drugs (statins) are known to inhibit the body's production of CoQ10. Kirkland Signature Ubiquinol may help replenish this important nutrient. Vitamin E is an antioxidant and essential nutrient for many cells, including heart muscle cells.
Kirkland Signature Ubiquinol helps support:
Heart function
Antioxidant activity
Cellular energy production
Suggested Use: Take one (1) softgel daily, with a meal.
Ubiquinol Country of Origin is USA. Packaged and quality tested in the USA.
Do not use if imprinted seal under cap is broken or missing.
Keep bottle tightly closed. Store in a cool, dry place, out of reach of children.

What is Ubiquinol?
Ubiquinol is the major circulating form of CoQ10 in the body. Ubiquinol helps support heart function and cellular energy production.
Ubiquinol
Energy 
Energy production
Statin drug users:
Statin drugs can reduce CoQ10 levels in the body. Kirkland Signature Ubiquinol may help replenish this important nutrient.

statements.notes: Quality purity potency

Kirkland Signature Hair, Skin & Nails has the right combination of vitamins, minerals and herbs to help maintain healthy hair, skin and nails. It includes key antioxidants - such as vitamin A, vitamin C, and vitamin E - that help fight free radicals and assist in cellular function and integrity. In addition, vitamin C helps support collagen production, which is essential for maintaining healthy skin. Calcium is critical for strong nails.
Biotin is an important B-complex vitamin that helps support healthy hair structure
Keratin is a key protein in the formation of hair, skin and nails.

No artificial dyes or flavors
No gluten
No lactose
No trans fat

statements.notes: Quality Purity Potency

Glucosamine and MSM is a beneficial supplement combination that helps support maximum flexibility, range of motion and joint lubrication. Together, this powerful duo promotes healthy cartilage and collagen that support fluid joint movement.

Glucosamine is a basic component of  cartilage and other connective tissues, which are needed for healthy structure and functions of joints. 
MSM (Methylsulfonylmethane), a bioavailable source of sulfur, is a necessary component that works in conjunction with Glucosamine to provide support for collagen, an important component of healthy joints and connective tissue. This product should be taken on a consistent basis to support joint health.
No Preservative Added - No Lactose - No Artificial Color or Flavor - No Gluten

Kirkland Signature Calcium 600 mg + D3 helps support strong bones. The addition of vitamin D helps your body to absorb calcium better.
May reduce the risk of osteoporosis
Calcium supports the growth of strong bones and teeth.

Recommended daily Allowances (RDA) for calcium were established by the Institute of Medicine (IOM) based on age and gender. Men between 19-70 years old require 1,000 mg calcium daily, whereas men over 71 years need 1,200 mg per day.
Women between the ages of 19-50 years old need 1,000 mg calcium per day and those over 50 years old need 1,200 mg per day. The Tolerable Upper Intake Level (UL) of calcium per men and women older than 18 years of age is 2,500 mg per day.
These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

The USP's drug standards are enforceable in the United States by the Food and Drug Administration.

Since 1995, the Kirkland Signature brand has been providing high quality supplements at a great member value. Kirkland Signature vitamins, minerals, and supplements are made from carefully selected ingredients from trusted suppliers. The supplements are manufactured in accordance with the Good Manufacturing Practice standards. Additionally, many of the items are verified by the United States Pharmacopeia (USP) which is an independent, scientific, non-profit organization that sets strict quality and purity standards for dietary supplements.

activeIngredients.name: Lactase
activeIngredients.notes: Lactase enzyme Note: 9,000 FCC Lactase Units

statements.notes:
How does this product work?
- Helps to prevent symptoms by breaking down milk sugar (lactose) and making dairy foods easier to digest.
- This product is not a drug, but a dietary supplement containing a natural lactase enzyme.
- This product works naturally and may be used by everyone ages 4 and older.

Why is this product better than other dairy relief products?
- This product starts working quickly, so more milk sugar (lactose) can be broken down overall.
- Starts working two times faster than ultra strength product.
- This product is packaged in a convenient 1 caplet dose, in individual pouches that are easy to take anywhere.

How do you use this product?
- Swallow one caplet with your first bite of dairy foods.
- You may adjust the dose if necessary to two caplets with your first bite of dairy foods. 
- if you continue to eat dairy foods after 30-45 minutes, taking an additional caplet is recommended.
How often can you use this product?
- This product may be used every time you eat foods containing dairy. It can be used with every meal or snack, every day.
Consult your doctor: If you experience any symptoms which are unusual or seem unrelated to the condition for which you took this product.
Keep out of the reach of children.
Do not use if single-serve packets are torn or open.
Store at room temperature (below 77(0)F), but do not refrigerate. Keep away from heat.
This statement has not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
Contains no Trans Fat
This product is not manufactured or distributed by McNeil Nutritionals, LLC, distributor of Lactaid.
Gluten free (<20 ppm)
Lactase enzyme
Natural Dairy Digestive Supplement

Helps prevent symptoms of
- Gas
- Bloating
- Diarrhea
Actual size
Single serve pouches: One caplet per serving
This product helps prevent the gas, bloating or diarrhea that many people with lactose intolerance may experience after eating foods containing dairy.
Compare to Lactaid Fast Act
Based on simulated in-vitro studies.

Glucosamine is a major structural component of cartilage, synovial fluid and

Kirkland Signature Organic Multivitamin has no artificial colors, flavors or preservatives.
Organically grown food contains no GMOs (Genetically Modified Organisms), which are prohibited under USDA organic certification standards.
The entire supply chain is Non-GMO Project Verified, meaning it has been reviewed to ensure there are no genetically modified ingredients.

The vitamins and minerals in Kirkland Signature Organic Multivitamin help deliver a complete formula that provides:
Immune support - with vitamins C, D, E, and Selenium
Heart support - with vitamins B6 and Folate
Cellular energy support - with vitamins B1, B2, B3, B6, B12, Folate, Biotin and Pantothenic Acid
Antioxidant support - with vitamins C, E, Zinc, Selenium and Manganese
Eye support - with vitamins A, C, E and Zinc
These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.
Suggested Use: As a dietary supplement, adults take one tablet daily with a meal.
Consult your doctor before use.

statements.type: Precautions re: Pregnant or Nursing or Prescription Medications
statements.notes: Caution: If you are pregnant or nursing, taking any medications, or if you have any medical condition or are planning any medical procedure, consult your doctor before use.
Discontinue use and consult your doctor if any adverse reactions occur.

Warning: Accidental overdose of iron-containing products is a leading cause of fatal poisoning in children under 6. Keep this product out of reach of children. In case of accidental overdose, call a doctor or poison control center immediately.

Since 1995, the Kirkland Signature brand has been providing high quality supplements at a great member value. Kirkland Signature vitamins, minerals, and supplements are made from carefully selected ingredients from trusted suppliers. The supplements are manufactured in accordance with the Good Manufacturing Practice standards. Additionally, many of the items are verified by the United States Pharmacopeia (USP) which is an independent, scientific, non-profit organization that sets strict quality and purity standards for dietary supplements.
